final_prompt.prompt:
Create a profile avatar for a content creator covering new energy vehicles, consumer electronics, and lifestyle products.

Style/medium: needs a globally-appealing minimalist aesthetic — references in the spirit of Dieter Rams functional design philosophy, Scandinavian design heritage, Muji visual identity; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered and balanced for social media profile crop compatibility
Subject: must include abstract or symbolic elements representing technology and lifestyle (no human figures)
Scene/backdrop: must be clean and neutral to work across Chinese and international social platforms
Lighting/mood: needs a calm, professional atmosphere — exact treatment is yours
Color palette: must be culturally neutral, avoiding region-specific symbolic colors
Materials/textures: must avoid religious symbols, national flags, or culturally sensitive iconography
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be universally acceptable across Chinese and international social media platforms; must avoid imagery that could offend specific cultural or religious groups
Avoid: human faces, religious symbols, national flags, region-specific political references, culturally charged colors or shapes
